title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libuv bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
An update for libuv is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

libuv is a multi-platform support library with a focus on asynchronous I/O. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update libuv to 1.51.0/latest version [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111973)
